titleStmt.title: SII 18.223: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 223. (B.K. No. 144 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring to Siṁghaṇadēva is dated in Śaka 1166, Krōdhi, Pushya ba. 10, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1244, December 25, Sunday f.d.t. ·45.

It registers a remission of taxes on certain articles granted by Bhāgubāyi jointly with Pradhāna Khannuva-paṇḍita, Śrīkaraṇa Nāgarasa and Suṁkādhikāri Maiḷugidēva. Bhāgubāyi is stated to be the Paramaviśvāsi (of the king) and the governor of Taddavāḍi, Heḍa and Kaṇaṁbaḍe provinces. The gift was made for the worship and offerings of god Svayaṁbhu-Siddhanāthadēva of Vijayāpura and was entrusted to Rājaguru Vāmaśaktidēva, the āchārya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavaThese words seem to lines between this line and the following.
© svasti śrīmatu sakavarṣa 1166
neya krōdhisaṁvatsarada pu
sya bahuḷa 10 Ādivāradaṁdu
śrīmatu prauḍhapratāpacakrava
rtti śrīsiṁghaṇadēva vijayōdayi
tatpādapadmōpajīvi paramavisvāsi
bhāgubāyigaḷu taddavāḍi he
ḍa kaṇaṁbaḍeyaṁtu mūṟunāḍaṁ tri
bhōgābhyaṁtaraṁ rājyaṁmāḍutta śrīvija
yāpurada śrīsvayaṁbhusiddha
nāthadēvara Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōga
caitrapai(pa)vitranimitta bhāgubāyigaḷu
pradhāna khaṁnuvapaṁḍita śrīkaraṇa
nāgarasanuṁ suṁkādhikāri maiḷugidē
vanu samastaniyōgigaḷu yayvattoka
paṭṭakarppūra bhūsa vidaḷa Ēna hē
ṟidaḍaṁ mūṟunāḍoḷage suṁ
ka parihāra sarvvanamasyaveṁdu yā
sthaḷadācāryya rājaguru ma
hābrati vāmasaktidēvarige U
ttarāyaṇasaṁkramāṇa parvvadalli
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salvaṁtāgi
koṭṭaru maṁgaḷamahātmaṁge Ārā
dhaneyāgi biṭṭayīsthānada sotra madhyama śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
